import jax
import jax.numpy as jnp

def compute_reward(state, action, next_state):
    BALL, PYRAMID, HEX = 3, 5, 11
    BLUE, GREEN, YELLOW = 3, 2, 5
    DIRECTIONS = jnp.array([[-1, 0], [0, 1], [1, 0], [0, -1]])

    H, W = next_state.grid.shape[:2]
    ys = jnp.arange(H)
    xs = jnp.arange(W)
    yy, xx = jnp.meshgrid(ys, xs, indexing='ij')
    max_dist = jnp.float32(H + W)

    prev_pos = state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)
    next_pos = next_state.agent.position.astype(jnp.float32)

    # Pocket states
    prev_holding_green = (state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    next_holding_green = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == BALL) & (next_state.agent.pocket[1] == GREEN)
    prev_empty = (state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)
    next_empty = (next_state.agent.pocket[0] == 0)

    pickup_event = prev_empty & next_holding_green
    putdown_event = prev_holding_green & next_empty

    # Blue pyramid location (from state, before it disappears on pickup)
    bp_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    bp_count_s = jnp.sum(bp_mask_s)
    bp_y_s = jnp.sum(yy * bp_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_s, 1)
    bp_x_s = jnp.sum(xx * bp_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_s, 1)

    bp_mask_ns = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == PYRAMID) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == BLUE)
    bp_count_ns = jnp.sum(bp_mask_ns)
    bp_y_ns = jnp.sum(yy * bp_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_ns, 1)
    bp_x_ns = jnp.sum(xx * bp_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(bp_count_ns, 1)

    pyramid_y = jnp.where(bp_count_s > 0, bp_y_s, bp_y_ns)
    pyramid_x = jnp.where(bp_count_s > 0, bp_x_s, bp_x_ns)
    pyramid_exists = (bp_count_s > 0) | (bp_count_ns > 0)

    # Yellow hex location
    yh_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yh_mask_ns = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == HEX) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == YELLOW)
    yh_count_s = jnp.sum(yh_mask_s)
    yh_count_ns = jnp.sum(yh_mask_ns)
    yh_y_s = jnp.sum(yy * yh_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(yh_count_s, 1)
    yh_x_s = jnp.sum(xx * yh_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(yh_count_s, 1)
    yh_y_ns = jnp.sum(yy * yh_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(yh_count_ns, 1)
    yh_x_ns = jnp.sum(xx * yh_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(yh_count_ns, 1)
    hex_y = jnp.where(yh_count_ns > 0, yh_y_ns, yh_y_s)
    hex_x = jnp.where(yh_count_ns > 0, yh_x_ns, yh_x_s)
    hex_exists = (yh_count_ns > 0) | (yh_count_s > 0)

    # Green ball on grid
    gb_mask_ns = (next_state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (next_state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count_ns = jnp.sum(gb_mask_ns)
    gb_y_ns = jnp.sum(yy * gb_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_ns, 1)
    gb_x_ns = jnp.sum(xx * gb_mask_ns) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_ns, 1)
    dist_gb_hex_ns = jnp.abs(gb_y_ns - hex_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x_ns - hex_x)

    gb_mask_s = (state.grid[:, :, 0] == BALL) & (state.grid[:, :, 1] == GREEN)
    gb_count_s = jnp.sum(gb_mask_s)
    gb_y_s = jnp.sum(yy * gb_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_s, 1)
    gb_x_s = jnp.sum(xx * gb_mask_s) / jnp.maximum(gb_count_s, 1)
    dist_gb_hex_s = jnp.abs(gb_y_s - hex_y) + jnp.abs(gb_x_s - hex_x)

    # Task success
    task_success_ns = (gb_count_ns > 0) & hex_exists & (dist_gb_hex_ns <= 1.5)
    task_success_s = (gb_count_s > 0) & hex_exists & (dist_gb_hex_s <= 1.5)
    just_succeeded = task_success_ns & ~task_success_s

    # Front tile of agent (where putdown places item)
    dy_next = DIRECTIONS[next_state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_next = DIRECTIONS[next_state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y_next = jnp.clip(next_state.agent.position[0] + dy_next, 0, H - 1)
    front_x_next = jnp.clip(next_state.agent.position[1] + dx_next, 0, W - 1)

    dy_prev = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][0]
    dx_prev = DIRECTIONS[state.agent.direction][1]
    front_y_prev = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[0] + dy_prev, 0, H - 1)
    front_x_prev = jnp.clip(state.agent.position[1] + dx_prev, 0, W - 1)

    # Is agent facing the hex?
    facing_hex_next = (front_y_next == jnp.round(hex_y).astype(jnp.int32)) & \
                      (front_x_next == jnp.round(hex_x).astype(jnp.int32)) & hex_exists
    facing_hex_prev = (front_y_prev == jnp.round(hex_y).astype(jnp.int32)) & \
                      (front_x_prev == jnp.round(hex_x).astype(jnp.int32)) & hex_exists

    # Is agent facing the pyramid?
    facing_pyr_next = (front_y_next == jnp.round(pyramid_y).astype(jnp.int32)) & \
                      (front_x_next == jnp.round(pyramid_x).astype(jnp.int32)) & pyramid_exists

    # Distances
    prev_dist_pyr = jnp.abs(prev_pos[0] - pyramid_y) + jnp.abs(prev_pos[1] - pyramid_x)
    next_dist_pyr = jnp.abs(next_pos[0] - pyramid_y) + jnp.abs(next_pos[1] - pyramid_x)

    prev_dist_hex = jnp.abs(prev_pos[0] - hex_y) + jnp.abs(prev_pos[1] - hex_x)
    next_dist_hex = jnp.abs(next_pos[0] - hex_y) + jnp.abs(next_pos[1] - hex_x)

    # Potential-based shaping: use normalized distance
    # Phase 1: not holding green → approach pyramid
    phi1_prev = -prev_dist_pyr / max_dist
    phi1_next = -next_dist_pyr / max_dist
    shape_phase1 = jnp.where(~prev_holding_green & pyramid_exists,
                              phi1_next - phi1_prev, jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Phase 2: holding green → approach hex
    phi2_prev = -prev_dist_hex / max_dist
    phi2_next = -next_dist_hex / max_dist
    shape_phase2 = jnp.where(prev_holding_green & hex_exists,
                              phi2_next - phi2_prev, jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Adjacency checks
    prev_adj_hex = (prev_dist_hex <= 1.5) & hex_exists
    next_adj_hex = (next_dist_hex <= 1.5) & hex_exists

    # Good putdown: facing hex when putting down (ball placed right next to hex)
    good_putdown = putdown_event & facing_hex_prev & hex_exists
    # Also accept: was adjacent to hex when putting down
    ok_putdown = putdown_event & prev_adj_hex & hex_exists & ~facing_hex_prev
    bad_putdown = putdown_event & ~prev_adj_hex

    r = jnp.float32(0.0)

    # Phase 1 shaping - approach pyramid
    r = r + shape_phase1 * jnp.float32(3.0)

    # Bonus for facing pyramid (encourages stopping and picking up)
    r = r + jnp.where(~prev_holding_green & facing_pyr_next & pyramid_exists,
                       jnp.float32(0.2), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Pickup milestone - large reward
    r = r + jnp.where(pickup_event, jnp.float32(5.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Phase 2 shaping - approach hex
    r = r + shape_phase2 * jnp.float32(3.0)

    # Bonus for reaching adjacency to hex while holding
    just_adj = next_adj_hex & ~prev_adj_hex & next_holding_green
    r = r + jnp.where(just_adj, jnp.float32(2.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Bonus for facing hex while holding (encourages alignment for putdown)
    r = r + jnp.where(next_holding_green & facing_hex_next & hex_exists,
                       jnp.float32(0.5), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Good putdown: facing hex → ball placed next to hex
    r = r + jnp.where(good_putdown, jnp.float32(15.0), jnp.float32(0.0))
    r = r + jnp.where(ok_putdown, jnp.float32(5.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Bad putdown penalty
    r = r + jnp.where(bad_putdown, jnp.float32(-3.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Task completion - large sparse reward
    r = r + jnp.where(just_succeeded, jnp.float32(50.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Persistent success reward
    r = r + jnp.where(task_success_ns, jnp.float32(1.0), jnp.float32(0.0))

    # Small step penalty
    r = r - jnp.float32(0.005)

    return r.astype(jnp.float32)
